c.d: Rate at which files are transferred between devices, affecting user experience especially for large files
Maximum file size allowed per transfer
Availability of the app on multiple operating systems such as Android, iOS, Windows, and macOS
Level of encryption provided during file transfer to protect user data

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: Quality of user interface design and simplicity of use for smooth file transfer
Extra functionalities such as multi-device transfer, chatting, offline capabilities, and file preview
Whether the app is free, contains ads, or includes in-app purchases and subscription options
Measure of app popularity based on total downloads or active users
